summary: Comprehensive testing of Urbanivity login functionality and mobility mode filtering completed successfully. All 17 features specified in review request are working perfectly with 100% backend API success and excellent frontend integration.
passed_tests: Backend API health check - 17/17 endpoints working (100% success)
POST /api/auth/login returns user object with id, name, email, role, role_name, logged_in_at
GET /api/auth/roles returns all 5 user roles (Executive, B2G, B2B, B2C, Technical)
Login form validation working - shows errors for missing name, email, or role
Login page renders at /login with name input, email input, and 5 role cards
Role selection shows role details with highlighted sections and badges
Login submits successfully and redirects to /dashboard/overview
Dashboard protection working - /dashboard without login redirects to /login
Dashboard shows logged-in user name and role in sidebar
Mobility mode bar displays all 14 modes as clickable chips
Mode chip selection highlights active filters
Clear all button appears when modes are selected and works correctly
Audience mode selector defaults to user's login role
Sign Out button logs out and redirects to /login
Landing page 'Launch Dashboard' button navigates to /login
All 14 mobility modes verified: walking, wheelchair, bicycle, e_bike, scooter, e_scooter, private_car, taxi, metro, bus, minibus, shuttle, park_and_ride, shared_mobility
Alerts page filters by selected mobility mode (6 total alerts, filtered to 2 for metro)
Transit Network page filters by selected mobility mode with map and line details
User authentication state persists correctly in localStorage
Form validation prevents submission without required fields
